subject: Commerce
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: COMMERCE
topics: Commerce is trade and aids to trade. It gives knowledge about the world of business and
activities: the economy, as it enables businesses and individuals to acquire the goods and services they need
to survive and thrive. In addition, it creates employment, generates revenue and creates wealth.
Learners therefore, learn about trade processes and how aids to trade facilitate these processes
and at the same time recognizing these aids as industries that are part of trade and their linkages.
expected to facilitate a learning process that allows learners to explore and discover concepts
under this topic on their own.
assessment: Describe the main categories of Commerce.
Describe how a farmer benefits from commercial services.
Discuss how Zambia benefits from Commerce.
Discuss how the world benefits from commerce.
